projectDescription: A browser-based React tool that converts any image into a symbol-labeled color-matrix alpha pattern, with configurable grid dimensions, color merging, alpha thresholds, an interactive pencil editor, and multi-format export (PNG, Excel, CSV, Google Sheets, HTML).
keyFeatures: Configurable N×M grid matrix with optional aspect-ratio lock
Color similarity merging via RGB-distance threshold (0–50%)
Alpha/transparency threshold to eliminate semi-transparent pixels
Interactive canvas preview with zoom, pan, and pencil editing
Undo / redo / undo-all / redo-all for pencil edits
Web Worker offloading for non-blocking pixel processing
Export to PNG (high-resolution), Excel (.xlsx), Excel with color (.xls), CSV, Google Sheets (.xlsx with color), HTML with color
publicApiSurface: processImage(img, cols, rows, options) → { colorMatrix, paletteMap, symbolMatrix }
processImageAsync(img, cols, rows, options) → Promise<{ colorMatrix, paletteMap, symbolMatrix }>
